title: M.Sc. Thesis: PFZs Monitoring & Fisheries Surveillance System using DTO Technology
description: Building a concept-level monitoring and fisheries surveillance system using Digital Twin Ocean technology, satellite ocean variables, analytics, dashboard thinking and AI-supported decision workflows.

title: B.Sc. Thesis: Identification of Potential MPAs using MCDM
description: Identification of potential Marine Protected Areas in the coastal region of Bangladesh using a Multi-Criteria Decision Making approach.

title: PFZ Modelling with Satellite Oceanographic Data
description: Climate-induced shifts in potential fishing zones using satellite-derived sea surface temperature, chlorophyll and oceanographic indicators with machine learning workflows.

title: Marine Heatwave Analysis in the Bay of Bengal
description: Trend analysis, anomaly detection and climate signal interpretation for marine heatwaves in coastal Bangladesh and the Bay of Bengal.

title: Water Quality and River Ecosystem Health Analytics
description: Environmental data analytics, biochemical river health interpretation and geospatial visualization using Python, R, SPSS and ArcGIS Pro.

title: Sundarbans Mangrove Ecosystem Health
description: Mangrove ecosystem health assessment, restoration prioritization and Earth observation-based decision support for the Sundarbans.
